title: Vibrant Korean Peppers Muchim
description: A peppery, crumbly Korean dish featuring sweet peppadew peppers, soffritto-base, and keto-friendly ingredients, served on a hot-stone-plate.
instructions: Preheat the hot-stone-plate to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, blend the soffritto mix until well combined.
In a large bowl, whisk together the sesame oil, soy sauce, rice vinegar, and gochujang.
Add the blended soffritto mix to the bowl and stir until well coated.
Add the peppadew peppers to the bowl and toss until they are evenly coated with the soffritto mixture.
Arrange the peppers on the preheated hot-stone-plate in a single layer.
Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions over the peppers.
Garnish with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
